title: When the Stars Meet the Sea
original_title: Quand les étoiles rencontrent la mer
overview: The film traces the destiny of Kapila, an outcast child who had been deemed by his fellow villagers to have supernatural powers of destruction, because of the timing of his solar eclipse birth.

trailers.title: Quand Les Etoiles Rencontrent La Mer Film Africaine Bande-Annonce Officielle
